name: RB GLOBAL INC.
summary: PART I ITEM 1:BUSINESS Company Overview Established in 1958, the Company is a leading, omnichannel marketplace and trusted provider of value-added insights, services and transaction solutions for buyers and sellers of commercial assets and vehicles worldwide.
